overview.label: Overview
overview.description: Shift landing: queue status, lane alerts, and dependency health.

runLane.label: Run lane
runLane.description: Process a vehicle through a lane — from capture to decision and barrier control.

reviewQueue.label: Review queue
reviewQueue.description: Pick up and resolve cases that need manual confirmation.

sessionHistory.label: Session history
sessionHistory.description: Search sessions, decisions, barrier events, and evidence over time.

laneMonitor.label: Lane monitor
laneMonitor.description: Live lane health, barrier status, and latest session state by site.

deviceHealth.label: Device health
deviceHealth.description: Device heartbeats and degradation by site and lane.

syncOutbox.label: Sync outbox
syncOutbox.description: Sync queue — retries, failures, and downstream delivery status.

reports.label: Reports
reports.description: Operational summaries by site and time window.

mobileCameraPair.label: Mobile camera pair
mobileCameraPair.description: Pair a mobile device to a lane for capture and heartbeat.

captureDebug.label: Capture debug
captureDebug.description: Monitor the capture feed and ALPR results for diagnostics.

subscriptions.label: Subscriptions
subscriptions.description: Manage parking subscriptions — vehicles, spots, and status.
subscriptions.createDescription: Create a new subscription record for a site, customer, plan, and validity window.
subscriptions.createFooter: Customer selection is manual in this wave because the current frontend shell does not yet expose a customer lookup endpoint.

validation.datesRequired: Please select start date and end date.
validation.startBeforeEnd: Start date must be on or before end date.

parkingLive.label: Parking live
parkingLive.description: Realtime occupancy — floor view, slot status, and drill-down.

settings.label: Settings
settings.description: Default context, auth and runtime diagnostics.

mobileCapture.label: Mobile capture
mobileCapture.description: Mobile UI for capturing and submitting images.

anonymous.label: Not signed in
anonymous.forbiddenCopy: You need an authenticated session before this screen can open.

ADMIN.label: Administrator
ADMIN.forbiddenCopy: This route is outside the active administrator session scope.

OPS.label: Operations
OPS.forbiddenCopy: This route is not part of your operations workspace policy.

GUARD.label: Guard
GUARD.forbiddenCopy: This route is outside the guard lane and checkpoint workflow.

CASHIER.label: Cashier
CASHIER.forbiddenCopy: This route is outside cashier reporting and payment follow-up.

WORKER.label: Worker
WORKER.forbiddenCopy: This route is outside the worker monitoring and background scope.

auth.bootingDesc: Validating the current session, principal, and landing route.
auth.bootstrapFallbackDesc: The shell could not verify the user context required to open this workspace.
auth.forbiddenHint: Retry bootstrap first. If it keeps happening, sign in again and check API connectivity.

common.routeErrorDesc: A route-level error occurred. Go back home or open Settings to check your session and API.

login.title: Sign in to Parkly Console
login.subtitle: Your role after sign-in decides the workspace.
login.roleAutoDesc: Default flow. Your authenticated session decides the workspace.
login.compatDemoDesc: Compatibility override for demo {{role}} accounts only.
login.policyAccess: After sign-in or sign-out, redirects follow role and route policy.
login.envHint: Leave `VITE_API_BASE_URL` empty for local dev to use the Vite API proxy.
login.subtitleLong: Access comes from the authenticated backend principal. The login form does not grant permissions on its own.
login.demoRoleHint: Only use when the backend login API still runs in demo compatibility mode. Production should stay on backend-assigned role.
login.destRoleHome: Role home from the authenticated session.
login.destIfAllowed: {{href}} if your authenticated role allows it; otherwise the role's default workspace.
login.bootstrapTimeoutBody: If you see timeouts: start the API (port 3000), bind 0.0.0.0, or leave VITE_API_BASE_URL empty to use the Vite proxy.

loginPage.subtitle: Your role after sign-in decides the workspace.
loginPage.footer: Secure operations console · Role policy is enforced after authentication

laneContext.title: Lane context panel
laneContext.description: Subscribes to topology only. The provider supplies a scoped store with no cross-table React state injection.
laneContext.scopeFooter: This scope is released when leaving /run-lane — state is not shared with other screens.

settingsPage.title: Settings
settingsPage.description: Auth shell diagnostics, runtime token, and default browser context.
settingsPage.cacheCleared: Local app cache cleared for this browser.

appearance.title: Appearance & language
appearance.description: Light/dark mode and UI language. Preferences are saved in this browser.
appearance.themeSystemDesc: Auto dark mode when OS prefers dark
appearance.themeLightDesc: Light mode, easy to see in bright light
appearance.themeDarkDesc: Dark mode, reduces eye strain at night
appearance.themeHint: System follows your OS light/dark preference.
appearance.languageHint: Vietnamese is the default; English for international partners.

apiHealth.title: API connection check
apiHealth.description: Verify the session shell via /api/health and /api/auth/me.
apiHealth.successMsg: API connection and current session are both valid.

operator.currentSessionDesc: User context is loaded from backend auth. Route guards, topbar, and navigation follow this principal.
operator.defaultContextDesc: Save default site, lane, and direction to reduce repeated setup during shifts.

developer.title: Developer / debug
developer.description: Build info, token preview, and local cache keys.
developer.surfaceBody: User-auth shell routes use the browser access token. Mobile capture and device heartbeat use device-signed credentials only. A device 401 must be debugged on the mobile surface, not by logging the web operator out.
developer.clearLocalDesc: Clears Parkly app keys in browser storage. Does not affect the backend.
developer.refreshHint: Reload the page after clearing cache if the UI still shows stale state.
developer.trouble1: Shell auth issues: /api/auth/*, route bootstrap, user role guards, realtime 401.
developer.trouble2: Device-signed issues: /api/devices/heartbeat and /api/gate-reads/* signed by device secret.
developer.trouble3: Do not treat device signature errors as proof that the browser user session is expired.

runLaneCapture.noPreviewYet: No preview yet. Select an image to upload.
runLaneCapture.selectImageDesc: Click to select a file or paste an image from clipboard (Ctrl+V)
runLaneCapture.runAlpr: Running ALPR recognition (may take 30-60 seconds on CPU)...
runLaneCapture.pleaseWait: Please wait for processing to complete
runLaneCapture.noCandidates: No candidates yet — upload an image to recognize
runLaneCapture.uploaded: Uploaded {{filename}}. Running recognition (CPU mode — may take 30-90 seconds)…
